---
title: "AEGIS Demo: Human Lymph Node"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{AEGIS Demo Human Lymph Node}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(AEGIS)
library(Seurat)
```

## Load authoritative raw files

This demo expects the authoritative files in the package source root:

- `V1_Human_Lymph_Node_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5`
- `V1_Human_Lymph_Node_spatial.tar.gz`
- `V1_Human_Lymph_Node_metrics_summary.csv`

```{r}
raw_dir <- normalizePath(".", mustWork = TRUE)
required <- c(
  "V1_Human_Lymph_Node_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5",
  "V1_Human_Lymph_Node_spatial.tar.gz",
  "V1_Human_Lymph_Node_metrics_summary.csv"
)

if (!all(file.exists(file.path(raw_dir, required)))) {
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

seu <- load_10x_lymphnode(data_dir = raw_dir)
seu
```

## Spatial transcriptomics slice example

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=6}
Seurat::SpatialFeaturePlot(seu, features = "nCount_Spatial")
```

## Simulate deconvolution and run AEGIS

```{r}
markers <- readRDS(system.file("extdata", "marker_list.rds", package = "AEGIS"))

deconv <- simulate_deconv_results(seu, seed = 2026)
obj <- as_aegis(seu, deconv, markers = markers)

obj <- audit_basic(obj)
obj <- audit_marker(obj)
obj <- audit_spatial(obj)
obj <- compare_methods(obj)
obj <- compute_consensus(obj)
```

## Example outputs

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
plot_audit(obj, "entropy")
```

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
plot_compare(obj, "heatmap")
```

## Render report

```{r eval=FALSE}
render_report(obj, output_file = "aegis_demo_report.html")
```
